creator: utisoft@gmail.com
text:
With reference to http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2010-January/014893.html utmp.h isn't necessary in this program, and can be removed without consequence.

	The attached patch updates ssltunnel-server to 1.18 and should unbreak the build on CURRENT.

	The update for ssltunnel-client is forthcoming...

Fix: 

-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.--gW8uXsZdYrByjz64RIxJfnCM3FCK8z76PX8nWhTevrr4pMUm
Content-Type: text/plain; name="ssltunnel-server.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="ssltunnel-server.diff"

diff -ruN ssltunnel-server.orig/Makefile ssltunnel-server/Makefile
--- ssltunnel-server.orig/Makefile	2010-03-20 14:29:20.000000000 +0000
+++ ssltunnel-server/Makefile	2010-06-25 14:54:15.000000000 +0100
@@ -9,27 +9,30 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	ssltunnel
-PORTVERSION=	1.16
+PORTVERSION=	1.18
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.hsc.fr/ressources/outils/ssltunnel/download/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-server
 
 MAINTAINER=	at@rominet.net
 COMMENT=	PPP over SSL virtual private networking (server part)
+LICENSE=	BSD
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-client
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
-.if ${OSVERSION} > 900007
-BROKEN=		fails to build with new utmpx
-.endif
-
 .if defined(WITH_TCPWRAPPERS)
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-libwrap
 .endif
 
+post-patch:
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's^#include <utmp.h>^/*utmp.h not for FreeBSD*/^' \
+		${WRKSRC}/server/main.c \
+		${WRKSRC}/server/pppwho.c \
+		${WRKSRC}/server/sessions.c
+
 post-install:
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
 	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
diff -ruN ssltunnel-server.orig/distinfo ssltunnel-server/distinfo
--- ssltunnel-server.orig/distinfo	2009-07-15 00:52:46.000000000 +0100
+++ ssltunnel-server/distinfo	2010-06-25 14:50:36.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (ssltunnel-1.16.tar.gz) = 4039b50566a33a4077883ea974e476d5
-SHA256 (ssltunnel-1.16.tar.gz) = e801ab170f364ba2997fb276d16eba1f75bffcc0fc5a1e97ff0b247bf63b0570
-SIZE (ssltunnel-1.16.tar.gz) = 140071
+MD5 (ssltunnel-1.18.tar.gz) = 67365324ec3ef232109c4a565f799604
+SHA256 (ssltunnel-1.18.tar.gz) = 1d2e4bbc935341775e7cc26dae980d6bdd5e8351f5a0cbf4d85363ac5d71081f
+SIZE (ssltunnel-1.18.tar.gz) = 132302
